Interface mysqlListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
mysqlBaseListener, MysqlParserListener
public interface mysqlListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by mysqlParser.
